content.en:
"Hahaha, no matter how powerful you are, without such a secret method as multiple particle forms, you can't be my opponent!"

After Wei knocked Ye Tian away again, he laughed wildly.

He felt that Ye Tian was already injured, and it wouldn't be long before he was sure to kill Ye Tian.

However, from beginning to end, Ye Tian did not panic in the slightest.

It's just that Wei ignored this and only thought that Ye Tian's emotions were well controlled and he didn't show panic.

After all, at their level, it's easy to control their emotions, and it doesn't mean anything.

Therefore, Wei still thinks that his victory is in sight.

......

"It seems that we must use the rudimentary power of the Ultimate Rule Realm, even if it is a little rudimentary power, you can still defeat Wei!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately.

Ye Tian used an ultimate weapon, a long knife, "Six Zero Zero" to cut out the blade of Aromu.

Wei thought that Ye Tian was still casting that top-notch ultimate arcane art, and he was not worried, after all, his multi-particle form could make his body extremely tough, and his defense power could be called invincible, so he was not afraid of Ye Tian's move.

However.

At the moment when Ye Tian's Arrow Mother Blade attacked Wei Wei's body, a rudimentary power of the Ultimate Rule Realm was attached to the long knife.

Tear and pull!

The multi-particle form of the ray broke through the defenses, and the tip of the knife pierced through his body, nearly slicing it in two.

And Wei also slammed Ye Tian with a fierce punch, just repelling Ye Tian.

"How is this possible?"

Wei watched as his body was nearly cut in two, and the countless ultimate particles on his body were annihilated, and the blow had already caused him great injuries.

"The power of the rudimentary form of the Ultimate Rule Realm, you have actually comprehended it!"

Wei was shocked, it was unbelievable.

That is a power that many ancient demon-level existences can't comprehend, and once they comprehend the power of the rudimentary form of the Ultimate Rule Realm, it means that it is not far from breaking through to the top Ancient Demon-level realm.

After all, the rudimentary form of comprehension is not very far from mastering the true realm of ultimate rules, and it can be broken through as long as you retreat for a long time.

Therefore, it is rare to see an Ancient Demon-level existence that comprehends the rudiments of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and they will all impact the top-level Ancient Demon-level existence in retreat.

But at this moment, Wei saw the power of the rudimentary form of the Ultimate Rule Realm in the body of an emperor-level, which was amazing!

Shout!

Ye Tian attacked again, Wei tried to dodge, but he didn't have time, the multi-particle form only made his body strength tougher, and his strength skyrocketed, but his speed did not increase much, naturally he couldn't dodge the attack of the Arrow Mu's Blade under the rudimentary form of the Ultimate Rule Realm.

Burst!

The tip of the knife passed through, and some of the ultimate particles were annihilated.

Wei didn't dare to fight again, and immediately urged a rare treasure, and his figure disappeared in a flash, and even escaped from the abyss of Qinghuan.

Ye Tian wanted to chase and kill, but he couldn't lock on to Wei's figure.

"This guy still has this kind of treasure to escape, unless he takes advantage of his carelessness and kills him directly, he really can't keep him!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He felt that he could only kill him unless he comprehended the true Ultimate Rule Realm and used the Ultimate Rule Realm to directly block this void so that the other party could not escape.

Of course.

If this treasure on Wei Wei's body is a consumption type and cannot be used many times, then Ye Tian also has the hope of killing the other party.

However, this time he didn't leave Wei, and Ye Tian didn't feel anything, even if he was emperor-level invincible, some emperor-level treasures had ancient demon-level treasures in their hands, and it was normal to escape.

Moreover, this time he encountered an emperor level of such strength, if it weren't for the power to comprehend the rudiments of the Ultimate Rule Realm, he would not even be an opponent.

This combat power was much more terrifying than the combat power before he did not break through the Ultimate Extreme Venerable in his era.

However, as long as he continued to cultivate, he was confident that he would be able to defeat it without using the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm Rudiment.

Of course, the multi-particle form that Wei performed this time made him very interested, and maybe he could learn about it.

Taking advantage of the retreat, Ye Tian looked for the emperor level of the Golden God Department again, and then slaughtered them one by one.

......

"What's wrong with you?"

"Lord Jiechi, I'm not lightly injured. Wei said: "There is an emperor level in the Qinghuan Abyss who is even more powerful than me, if it weren't for the escape with the help of the space-time magic bead, I am afraid that he would have to be injured and fall." "

"You can't beat that emperor, how is this possible, you have practiced the secret method of multi-particle form!"

He is very aware of Wei Wei's strength, even if his combat power at the emperor level is not as good as Wei now!

"Yes, I can't beat him, even the multi-particle form was shattered by the other party, that guy not only created three top-notch ultimate arcane arts, but even comprehended the power of the rudimentary form of the ultimate rule realm, I even suspect that he is the doppelganger of a top-notch ancient demon-level existence!" Wei said.

"It can't be a clone of an ancient demon-level existence, if it is a clone of an ancient demon-level existence, if you dare to participate, you will definitely be killed by the main department of the mother of Luo, and the main department of the mother of Luo will not allow any existence of the ancient demon level to violate the orders they have formulated. Jie Chi said.

"Then it may be that the other party is really evil!"

Wei said.

Jie Chi frowned, if there was no ban from the main department of the mother of Aluo, he even wanted to kill Ye Tian now, he did not allow such a demonic genius to live, and he was also the enemy of the Golden God Department!

"Let those emperors hide in the Qinghuan Abyss Headquarters, with the cover of the formation, the emperor level called Heaven can't kill them. "

Jie Chi said.

Immediately, he returned to the Golden God Department and consulted with the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon.

This war can't be lost, and Ye Tian is too demonic, if they don't kill Ye Tian, they don't want to win this war.

And soon, the news that Ye Tian had killed all sides and even defeated Wei was known by the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

......

Tribe of Dragons.

"There is an emperor-level 4.7 who massacres the emperor-level of the Golden God Department, and also defeats the legendary !!!"

Dragon Shadow was shocked to learn of this information.

You must know that not long ago, when he hadn't broken through to the ancient demon level, he was not Wei's opponent.

Wei was able to sweep away the dragon tribe with his own strength, and he was truly incomparably demonic, and was called an emperor-level invincible existence.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian was able to defeat Wei Tian.

And soon, Ye Tian's information was also known to Long Ying.

"It turned out to be him, and it was he who reported the information about Haru's seal!" Ryukage muttered.

He didn't care about this little guy who reported intelligence at the beginning, after all, at that time, Ye Tiancai was at the king level, but he didn't expect that not long after breaking through the emperor level, he would directly sweep the emperor level of the Golden God Department.

This son is terrifying!.
